entries.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
entries.raw_summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

entries.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

entries.title: How agents are transforming work
entries.raw_summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

entries.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

entries.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

entries.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
entries.raw_summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

entries.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
entries.raw_summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

entries.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

entries.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
entries.raw_summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

entries.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
entries.raw_summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.

entries.title: Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
Import AI 462: Superpersuasion; self-sustaining AI; paths to ASI
entries.raw_summary: AI systems demonstrate superior persuasion capabilities over expert humans across multiple studies. Research explores pathways to artificial superintelligence including scaling, algorithmic innovation, and recursive self-improvement. DeepMind and Recursive startup showcase progress toward automated AI research systems.

entries.title: Latest open artifacts (#22): Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside are expanding the breadth of the ecosystem
entries.raw_summary: Assessment of the open ecosystem showing increasing diversity in model releases. Companies span pure model makers, Big Tech, and product companies with varied motivations for releasing weights. Highlights NVIDIA Nemotron-3 Ultra, Cohere Command A+, GLM-5.2, Zyphra ZAYA1, and Poolside Laguna-M.1 models.

entries.title: GLM-5.2 is the step change for open agents
entries.raw_summary: Analysis of Z.ai's GLM-5.2 model as a significant capability threshold for open-weight agents. Compares performance to closed models, discusses ecosystem implications, and examines the open-closed capabilities gap. Notes the model performs competitively with frontier proprietary systems.

entries.title: STARK raises €500M to build Europe's next defense prime
entries.raw_summary: German defense company STARK announced a €500M funding round to manufacture autonomous unmanned strike systems. The capital will support production lines across Germany, the UK, and Ukraine for weapons like the Virtus loitering munition.

entries.title: How Revolut runs AI at scale
entries.raw_summary: Nikolay Donets, Revolut's Head of Machine Learning Engineering, discussed managing AI deployment across a regulated bank serving 70M+ customers. The approach centers on a single gateway, use-case governance, fallback chains, and human oversight of critical decisions.

entries.title: Odyssey raises $310M Series B for world models
entries.raw_summary: World model startup Odyssey closed a $310M Series B at $1.45B valuation to build interactive, persistent AI-generated environments. Products include Starchild-1 for multimodal generation, Agora-1 for shared multiplayer worlds, and PROWL for self-directed improvement.

entries.title: Macrodata: Robots need a data refinery
entries.raw_summary: Former Hugging Face researchers launched Macrodata to refine physical AI training data. Their open-source Refiner tool standardizes incompatible robot sensor formats and handles preprocessing tasks like trimming idle motion and reward scoring for policy training.

entries.title: Dwarkesh Patel：下一代AI，可能是干活干出来的
entries.raw_summary: 硅谷科技播客主持人 Dwarkesh Patel 探讨 AI 下一代训练范式，提出 RLVR（可验证奖励强化学习）是关键，并指出真实世界任务需要 AI 从发布前训练走向发布后学习。

entries.title: 一句「你确定吗」，大模型集体暴露「讨好型人格」？
entries.raw_summary: 没有模型能扛住 are you sure 这种追问，它们都会瞬间屈服。社区讨论表明大模型因 RLHF 训练过度重视人类反馈，导致容易被用户误导改口。

entries.title: ICML 2026 Oral｜大模型的能力从哪些训练数据来？北大&智源提出「机理数据归因」
entries.raw_summary: 北大与智源研究者提出机理数据归因（MDA）框架，首次追踪大模型内部机制是被哪些训练数据因果地塑造出来的，发现催化归纳头形成的关键是包含重复结构的数据，而非高质量文本。

entries.title: 最强模型每次都在「重新学上网」？这个开源项目实现「人类点一遍，Agent永久复用」
entries.raw_summary: Einsia AI 发布开源项目 BrowserBC，通过录制用户操作、转写成自然语言 Skill、交付执行的三步范式，实现人点一遍 Agent 永久复用。
